text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmm… El and Grass have been in there for a while now. 
Do you think everything is okay?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Not sure. And the president's been in device 01 
running this whole time…

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf?
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff… puff… Hehe. Hehehaha! Heh…

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh? Is President Rudolf… laughing in there?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Whaddya mean, they're burning everything? What's going on?!

text_block_list.name: Mercenary Machos
text_block_list.text:
The demon army targeted the village's food reserves! 
I wish we could go back and save everyone, but we'll 
never make it in time!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
No. That may be true of you, or werewolves, 
or perhaps even wyverns. However…

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
We're horsegirls! We can cover the distance. 
Let's go, El! This is our "Fantasy Debut"!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Haaaah!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
We're horsegirls, the fastest of all life in Uma Nest. 
In the blink of an eye, we cross many miles, until…

text_block_list.name: Demon Army Officer
text_block_list.text:
They've come to meddle with our plans?! 
Soldiers, slather your arrows with toxins and tranquilizers! 
We're gonna rain terror upon them!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Demon Army Officer
text_block_list.text: Did we get her?! Bwahaha! Just a drop of that poison could—

text_block_list.name: Demon Army Officer
text_block_list.text: What's this?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Not only are we fast, but we're also extremely resilient. 
Horsegirls can shrug off basic debuffs like poison and paralysis.

text_block_list.name: Demon Army Officer
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah? We'll see how resilient you really are! Keep firing! Give 'em more poison than they can shake!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Who's spinnin' the ground… Ack, Grass! Grass?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear… Just because you're resistant 
doesn't mean you're invincible.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Comforting Heal!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Nice one! Now we're talking!

text_block_list.name: Demon Army Officer
text_block_list.text:
Heh. We'll just fight magic with magic. Sink their ankles 
into a mucky quagmire! Mudfield!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Horsegirl Skill: Bad Track Condition ◎!

text_block_list.name: Demon Army Officer
text_block_list.text:
What?! Argh, you have left me with no recourse 
but to cast a time-reversal spell!

text_block_list.name: Demon Army Officer
text_block_list.text: Reverse! Hands of the clock, turn backward!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: A time-reversal skill? We don't have anything to counter that…

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
(But horsegirls never give up! If time is running 
counterclockwise, then so will I!)

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: (Horsegirl Skill: Left Turns ◎!!!)

text_block_list.name: Demon Army Officer
text_block_list.text: What?! They can go counterclockwise?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hiyaaah! Shrieking Condor Wave!!

text_block_list.name: Demon Army Officer
text_block_list.text: Gyaaaah!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Now apologize! And give back the food you've stolen!

text_block_list.name: Demon Army Officer
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh heh, hahahaha! What a shame! My lordship has already
taken all your food supplies away! It seems you arrived too late.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The demon lord was here?! We must give chase and capture 
that tyrant. No one can outrun a horsegirl.

text_block_list.name: Demon Army Officer
text_block_list.text: Hmph… It is no use. You will never catch up to the demon lord.

text_block_list.name: Demon Army Officer
text_block_list.text: For my lordship is no mere man or beast… but something faster!

text_block_list.name: Demon Army Officer
text_block_list.text: So give up. I assume you can put two and two together.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
What could be so fast that even horsegirls can't catch up? 
They'd have to be faster than a wyvern to start, so that leaves 
fenrirs, thunderdrakes, or…

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: No, y-you can't mean……!?

text_block_list.name: Demon Army Officer
text_block_list.text:
Mwahaha. Finally figured it out, huh? Yes, our new lord 
of demons is capable of running just as fast as you. 
Because our lordship is ——

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf?
text_block_list.text: Heh, hehehe… Take thaaaat!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! The runner in device 01 is talking again! 
But that didn't sound like President Rudolf…

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Rice grains, in the bag! Now I've got everything I need to make 
some tasty rice porridge! If Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled 
peppers, then I'll pick a pretty plenty pound!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Isn't that Golshi?! She's definitely not in there for a test run. 
She's just fooling around…

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Knowing her, she's not just fooling around. She's probably causing the system error herself…

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Director, why don't we just kick her out of there?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. If we fiddle with the machines now, there's a chance 
it'd only make things worse! So…

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Onwards! We must commit firmly to the course we've set!
